_comment: weather config -- copy to weather.json, edit for your location, then sudo systemctl restart weather.timer
_latlon_comment: Latitude / longitude in decimal degrees. Look up your house location on any map service.
_panel_comment: Nameplate DC peak of your PV array in kW. Used to convert Open-Meteo shortwave radiation (W/m^2) into an expected AC output figure. E.g. 6x 400W panels = 2.4 kW.
_efficiency_comment: End-to-end system efficiency (inverter + wiring + soiling + off-angle). 0.7-0.85 is typical.
